technical_skills.title: Technische vaardigheden
technical_skills.programming_principles_desc: Algoritmen en datastructuren, computationele complexiteit, programmeerparadigma's (concurrent, declaratief, functioneel, imperatief, procedureel, reactief, objectgeoriënteerd), machine learning.
technical_skills.system_programming_desc: Linux API, Bash, Python, C, C++, Java, Javascript, Rust, Go, build-systemen (CMake, Make, Maven, Gradle, Cargo, Poetry, Npm, Pnpm).
technical_skills.web_frameworks_desc: Angular, Next.js, Nuxt, Express, Django, FastAPI, Ruby on Rails.
technical_skills.frontend_web_desc: Angular, React, Vue, Bootstrap, JQuery, Sass, Tailwind, Shadcn.
technical_skills.frontend_mobile_desktop_desc: Android SDK, Google Play Services, Flutter, Cordova, React Native, Gtk, Qt, Gnome SDK.
technical_skills.databases_desc: Firebase, Supabase, MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite.
technical_skills.devops_desc: AWS (VPC, EC2, ECS, Fargate, S3, RDS, Route 53, CloudFront, Lambda, API Gateway, IAM, CloudWatch, SNS, SQS, CodePipeline, CodeBuild, CodeDeploy, CloudFormation, Node SDK), Azure, Docker, Git, GitHub Actions, Nginx, SSH, SSL, GnuPG.
technical_skills.data_science_desc: Jupyter, MatPlotLib, NumPy, PyTorch, Pandas, SciPy.
technical_skills.embedded_desc: Arduino SDK, IoT-systemen (MQTT, Zigbee), elektronische simulaties met SPICE.
technical_skills.multimedia_software_desc: FreeCAD, KiCAD, Blender, Cairo, Ffmpeg, Gimp, Inkscape, Imagemagick, Latex, Pandoc, Godot, Krita, Neovim, Code OSS, Ardour, Olive Video Editor, OBS Studio, Audacity.
